reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio y atención, las chicas muy amables y serviciales, da gusto venir y ya ver una sonrisa. El café excelente! Muy lindo lugar para hacer un break.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention, the girls are very friendly and helpful, it's a pleasure to come and see a smile. The coffee is excellent! A very nice place to take a break.

reviews.comment:

Nice place to fill up, but when fuel is scarce the line is long and it gets very hot.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención , alguna demora ocasional por exceso de clientes cargando combustible

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, some occasional delays due to a high volume of customers refueling
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNjV5dS1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nuestra experiencia fue muy negativa, no había gasolina, esperamos 1 hora que un camión descargara a las 11hs del mediodía, pasado más de 40 minutos llega otro camión, para esto había colas de autos y motos, pasado 20 minutos, es decir más de 1 hora, mi esposo baja a consultar y le dicen que hasta las 14:30hs teníamos que esperar, falta de EMPATÍA TOTAL, no costaba nada avisar y ofrecer otros servicios, cuándo mi esposo lo manifiesta por los NIÑOS Y FAMILIAS, uno de los camioneros de malos modos dijo que debía retirarse, lo qué logró que mi marido reaccionará y le explicara que su acción no correspondía y que se iba a informar con la empresa. LAMENTABLE!!!

(Translated by Google)
Our experience was very negative. There was no gasoline. We waited an hour for a truck to unload at 11:00 AM. After more than 40 minutes, another truck arrived, by which time there were lines of cars and motorcycles. Twenty minutes later, meaning more than an hour had passed, my husband got out to ask and was told we would have to wait until 2:30 PM. A complete lack of empathy! It wouldn't have cost anything to inform us and offer other services. When my husband mentioned this because of the children and families, one of the truck drivers rudely told him he had to leave. This prompted my husband to react and explain that his actions were unacceptable and that he would contact the company. Disgraceful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCM1k2dTh3RRAB
